steps.title: Follow the parallel with cacao
steps.content: Cacao is described as no longer identical to its wild ancestor. The word 'also' signals that maize should be described in the same way: as different from the wild ancestor plant.

steps.title: Pick the precise verb phrase
steps.content: B suggests helping, C suggests reacting, and D suggests arguing; none describes the structural difference between domesticated maize and its ancestor. The phrase meaning 'differs from' fits the comparison. The answer is A.
